title: Support `disabling fork by name`
body:
In release v5.018 you added support for `disable fork`, would it be possible to extend it to support `disabling fork by name`?

I would like to use VUnit but it fails with message:
```txt
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: vunit_pkg.sv:222:13: Unsupported: disabling fork by name
  222 |             disable wait_or_timeout;
```
I tried it with Verilator v5.028.
code_blocks:
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: vunit_pkg.sv:222:13: Unsupported: disabling fork by name
  222 |             disable wait_or_timeout;
